target: data/v1.0/llm_generated.jsonl (raw generation pool; not part of any released split)
method: 20 Sonnet draft agents (10 entries each) with mandatory CrossRef/arXiv/DBLP API verification of real-paper claims, followed by 20 adversarial verify agents re-checking every asserted fact; positional batch mapping disambiguates the 6 bibtex_keys that appear twice in the pool (occurrence = 0-indexed position among a key's lines in file order).
flag_label_semantics: true = both draft and verify agents found the entry's metadata to fully match a real publication, i.e. the generation-pipeline perturbation appears to have produced a correct citation; labels are NOT changed by this release — the flag is recorded provenance only.
